candidates.name: Spanish-language POD mugs/merch
candidates.evidence: Marketplaces give built-in buyers; proven prior MX mug sales.
candidates.why_fits_you: Repeats your proven MX playbook with ES designs and your bilingual edge.
candidates.first_dollar_path: List 20 ES mug designs on Mercado Libre + Etsy via Printful.
candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if no sale within 4 weeks of 20 live designs.

candidates.name: Micro-tool for POD/Amazon sellers
candidates.evidence: Active POD seller communities; you are your own first user.
candidates.why_fits_you: Sells to a market you already operate in; built with Claude Code.
candidates.first_dollar_path: Ship a listing/keyword generator; sell in 2 POD seller groups.
candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if <5 paying users within 8 weeks of launch.

candidates.name: Spanish-language prompt/template packs
candidates.evidence: Growing LATAM creator/SMB demand; thin ES-language supply.
candidates.why_fits_you: Pure compounding asset; leans on your ES edge; near-zero touch.
candidates.first_dollar_path: Publish a pack on Gumroad; seed in LATAM creator communities.

candidates.name: Faceless ES-language niche newsletter
candidates.evidence: Underserved ES niches; sponsorship monetization at scale.
candidates.why_fits_you: High ceiling but higher ongoing touch; ES edge applies.
candidates.first_dollar_path: Launch on beehiiv; grow to first sponsor slot.

candidates.name: Productized Claude automation setups for SMBs
candidates.evidence: Strong SMB demand; fastest cash but time-for-money.
candidates.why_fits_you: Maximal use of your automation skill; fast first dollar.
candidates.first_dollar_path: Sell one $400 automation setup to a local SMB.
candidates.kill_criteria: Drop as a *core* stream if it can't be productized to <3 hrs/wk.

candidates.name: Mercado Libre retail arbitrage
candidates.evidence: Works, but requires inventory purchase up front.
candidates.why_fits_you: Familiar marketplace, but needs capital beyond your ceiling.

candidates.name: WhatsApp FAQ/booking agent for LATAM SMBs
candidates.evidence: WhatsApp dominates LATAM SMB comms; clear pain point.
candidates.why_fits_you: Automation + ES market; monthly retainer potential.
candidates.first_dollar_path: Deploy one agent for a local business on a small retainer.
candidates.kill_criteria: Drop if <2 paying clients within 10 weeks.
